hooks.command: if [ -d .satori/core ]; then echo '--- SATORI CONTEXT ---'; head -50 .satori/core/identity.md 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; head -60 .satori/core/patterns.md 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; head -30 .satori/core/formulation.md 2>/dev/null; echo '--- END SATORI CONTEXT ---'; else echo 'NO_SATORI_DIR'; fi
